# @devalok/shilp-sutra-brand

> Logo components and brand assets for Devalok and Karm.
> Provides React components, favicon helpers, and raw asset imports.

## Install & Import

pnpm add @devalok/shilp-sutra-brand

// Logo components:
import { DevalokLogo, KarmLogo } from '@devalok/shilp-sutra-brand'

// Per-brand imports:
import { DevalokLogo, generateDevalokFavicon } from '@devalok/shilp-sutra-brand/devalok'
import { KarmLogo, generateKarmFavicon } from '@devalok/shilp-sutra-brand/karm'

// Raw asset files:
import monogram from '@devalok/shilp-sutra-brand/assets/devalok/logos/monogram-brand.png'

## Components

### DevalokLogo
- type: 'monogram' | 'monogram-wordmark' | 'monogram-shell' | 'monogram-shell-wordmark' | 'monogram-coin-wordmark' | 'wordmark' | 'dass' | 'shloka' | 'chakra'
- color: 'brand' | 'black' | 'white' | 'auto' (auto = dark mode aware via .dark class)
- size: 'xs' (24px) | 'sm' (32px) | 'md' (40px) | 'lg' (56px) | 'xl' (80px)
- simplifyBelow: number (auto-simplify to monogram below this width, default 32)
- aria-label, aria-hidden, role, className

### DevalokLogo.Link
- Compound anchor wrapper: <DevalokLogo.Link href="/"><DevalokLogo type="monogram" /></DevalokLogo.Link>
- Extends React.AnchorHTMLAttributes

### KarmLogo
- type: 'icon' | 'wordmark' | 'wordmark-icon'
- color: 'brand' | 'black' | 'white' | 'auto'
- size: 'xs' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl' (same px mapping as DevalokLogo)
- Same accessibility props as DevalokLogo

### KarmLogo.Link
- Same pattern as DevalokLogo.Link

## Favicon Helpers

### generateDevalokFavicon(options?)
Returns Next.js metadata-compatible icon config.
  options.color: 'brand' | 'black' | 'white' (default: 'brand')

Usage in Next.js layout.tsx:
  import { generateDevalokFavicon } from '@devalok/shilp-sutra-brand/devalok'
  export const metadata = { ...generateDevalokFavicon({ color: 'brand' }) }

### generateKarmFavicon(options?)
Same pattern, returns icon + apple + manifest paths.
  import { generateKarmFavicon } from '@devalok/shilp-sutra-brand/karm'
  export const metadata = { ...generateKarmFavicon({ color: 'brand' }) }

### getDevalokFaviconPath(options?) / getKarmFaviconPath(options?)
Returns a single favicon file path string.
  options: { color, size, format }

## Raw Asset Paths

Assets available via wildcard import: @devalok/shilp-sutra-brand/assets/*

Devalok logos (PNG/SVG/WebP, 3 colors each):
  assets/devalok/logos/monogram-{brand,black,white}.png
  assets/devalok/logos/monogram-wordmark-{brand,black,white}.png
  assets/devalok/logos/monogram-shell-{brand,black,white}.png
  assets/devalok/logos/monogram-shell-wordmark-{brand,black,white}.png
  assets/devalok/logos/monogram-coin-wordmark-{brand,black,white}.png
  assets/devalok/logos/shloka-{brand,black,white}.png

Devalok favicons:
  assets/devalok/favicons/favicon-{brand,black,white}.svg
  assets/devalok/favicons/favicon-{brand,black,white}-{16,32,96,180,512}.png

Karm favicons:
  assets/karm/favicons/favicon-brand.ico
  assets/karm/favicons/favicon-{brand,black,white}.svg
  assets/karm/favicons/favicon-brand-{96,180,192,512}.png

## Key Notes

- color="auto" uses MutationObserver on .dark class for dark mode switching
- Large PNG logos (monogram, shloka) render as <img>; smaller SVGs inline as React components
- Karm logos are all inline SVG (no PNG assets)
- Brand colors: brand=#D33163, brandDark=#B8284F
